meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Ship Faster
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on your MVP. Learn to Claude Code skills setup with Antigravity to automate development and finally launch your SaaS project today.
content.answer_block: The root cause of unfinished projects is high friction between ideation and deployment. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you transform your CLI into a autonomous co-founder. This setup streamlines architectural scaffolding and debugging, allowing you to bypass manual coding bottlenecks and focus strictly on revenue-generating features.
content.intro:
The graveyard of SaaS startups is paved with 'almost finished' MVPs. You have the vision, the market research, and the passion, but the gap between a blank IDE and a production-ready build is a canyon of technical debt and context switching. Every hour you spend debugging boilerplate is an hour you aren't talking to customers.

Today, we stop the cycle of unfinished projects. By leveraging Claude Code’s autonomous reasoning alongside Antigravity’s structural engine, you gain the leverage of a ten-person engineering team. This isn't just about writing code; it’s about building a high-velocity machine that turns your business requirements into deployed software in record time.

steps.title: Environment Initialization
steps.description: Establish a clean, robust workspace architecture that prevents dependency hell before you write a single line of business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a professional SaaS boilerplate with TypeScript, Tailwind, and Supabase integration. Configure strict linting and environment variables.

steps.title: Database Schema Mapping
steps.description: Translate your business model into a relational database schema without manually writing SQL migrations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a normalized PostgreSQL schema for a subscription-based SaaS platform including user roles, plan tiers, and stripe_customer_ids.

steps.title: Feature Scaffolding
steps.description: Rapidly construct the core functional modules of your product using AI-driven context awareness.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a secure authentication middleware and a CRUD API route for user project management based on the existing schema.

steps.title: Autonomous Debugging
steps.description: Leverage Claude Code to identify and resolve logic gaps in your business flow before they manifest as production bugs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the codebase for potential race conditions in the subscription payment flow and suggest a robust fix.

steps.title: Deployment Automation
steps.description: Configure your CI/CD pipeline to ensure that your code moves from local to production without manual interference.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for automated testing and deployment to Vercel upon merge to the main branch.

pro_tips: Treat your prompts like PRDs: Define the 'why' and 'who' before the 'how' to drastically increase code quality.
Use Claude Code's '--compact' flag for large projects to reduce token costs while maintaining architectural context.
Always run your tests through the AI first; let it write the test cases before you write the function logic.
Keep your Antigravity config files in a separate repo to reuse your 'golden stack' across all future SaaS projects.
Use the 'Review' command as a mandatory step before every commit to catch edge cases you missed.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is running, implement a feedback loop by connecting your support inbox to your Antigravity dashboard to prioritize feature requests based on real user pain points.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting your ideas die in a private repository. You have the tools, the architecture, and the blueprint to ship. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
